features.title: Boutique Service
features.body: Direct access to a senior agent from first appraisal to final settlement. No handovers, no junior teams.

features.title: Strategic Marketing
features.body: Tailored campaigns across digital, print and our private buyer network, presented to magazine standard.

features.title: Local Expertise
features.body: Two decades of inner-Melbourne knowledge, street by street, buyer by buyer.

features.title: Exceptional Negotiation
features.body: Calm, considered and relentless on your behalf, with a track record of results above reserve.

lifestyle.supporting: The best homes are inseparable from where they sit: leafy streets, a favourite café, a school you trust, the city minutes away. We sell the life, not just the floor plan.

images.alt: Tree-lined Melbourne street in golden light

team.heading: Meet the people behind the results.
team.image_alt: Julian Brooke, Director and Lead Agent at Hawthorne Property Group
team.name: Julian Brooke
paragraphs: I started Hawthorne with a simple conviction: selling a home is personal, and it should feel that way from the first conversation to the moment the contract is signed.
Over twenty years across Melbourne's inner east, I've learned that the best results come from preparation, presentation and genuine negotiation, not pressure or promises.
I take on a deliberately small number of campaigns each season, because the home you're trusting me with deserves my full attention.

process.heading: A clear strategy. From day one.
process.supporting: A transparent, four-step path designed to position your home for its best possible result.

steps.title: Property Appraisal
steps.body: An honest, evidence-based assessment of your home's value and its position in today's market.

steps.title: Campaign Planning
steps.body: A tailored marketing and presentation strategy built around your home and your timeline.

steps.title: Launch & Marketing
steps.body: A polished campaign across every channel, reaching the right buyers from the first weekend.

steps.title: Negotiation & Sale
steps.body: Skilled negotiation to convert genuine interest into the strongest possible result.

items.quote: Julian achieved a result we genuinely didn't think was possible. Every step felt considered, calm and completely in our corner.
items.name: The Whitmore Family

items.quote: The marketing was exceptional and the communication constant. It felt less like a sale and more like a carefully run campaign.
items.name: Andrea & Paul

items.quote: Boutique in the truest sense. We had one senior agent who knew our home and our street better than we did.
items.name: Richard T.

items.q: How much is my property worth?
items.a: Value comes down to your home's position, presentation and the current market, not a single online estimate. We provide a considered, evidence-based appraisal drawn from comparable local sales and live buyer demand, with no obligation.

items.q: How long does a campaign take?
items.a: A typical campaign runs three to four weeks from launch to sale, plus a short preparation period beforehand. We'll recommend the timing and method, whether auction, private sale or expressions of interest, that best suits your home.

Our fee is a transparent percentage of the sale price, agreed in writing upfront with no hidden costs. Marketing is quoted separately and tailored to your campaign, so you only invest in what will move the result.

The best time depends on your circumstances and the market, not just the calendar. Spring and autumn are traditionally strong, but well-presented homes sell well year-round. We're happy to advise honestly on timing at your appraisal.

appraisal.heading: Let's discuss your property.
appraisal.supporting: Request a private, no-obligation appraisal. We'll be in touch to arrange a time that suits you.
appraisal.reassurance: Private & confidential · No obligation · A considered, honest assessment

final_cta.supporting: Book a private appraisal and let's talk about what your home could achieve.
